category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tfprovidercheck as a CLI to prevent malicious Terraform providers from being executed.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as tfprovidercheck.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page and README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/suzuki-shunsuke/tfprovidercheck, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions preventing malicious Terraform Providers from being executed; current_curation.tags includes cli.
